array_types.name: qrng_values_type
array_types.code: type qrng_values_type is array (Positive range <>) of double;

record_types.name: gsl_qrng
gsl_qrng_type

variables.name: halton
variables.code:
halton : access constant gsl_qrng_type
with
   Import        => True,
   Convention    => C,
   External_Name => "gsl_qrng_halton";

niederreiter_2 : access constant gsl_qrng_type
with

variables.name: sobol

with

   External_Name => "gsl_qrng_sobol";

function alloc
  (T : access constant gsl_qrng_type; dimension : unsigned)
